resources.string: Google Play services are not available on this device.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
You\'re currently offline. Some features may not be available.
Failed to load content. Please try again.
Failed to save. Please try again.
Unable to load settings. Please try again.
Unable to save settings. Please try again.
Content sync is not available. Supabase is not configured.
Failed to check for updates. Please try again.
Failed to clear cache. Please try again.
Unable to load lesson. Please try again.
Unable to load quiz. Please try again.
Unable to load video. Please check your connection and try again.
Unable to load image. Please check your connection and try again.
Unable to load media. Please try again.
Camera permission is required for sign language detection.
Unable to set up camera. Please try again.
Lesson data is missing. Please sync content.
Unable to load dictionary. Please try again.
Failed to load words. Please try again.
Unable to load minigame. Please try again.
Unable to save progress. Don\'t worry, your progress will be saved when you\'re back online.
Authentication failed. Please try logging in again.
Google Sign-In failed. Please try again.
Google Sign-In configuration error. Please contact support.
Network error during Google Sign-In. Please check your connection.
Internal error during Google Sign-In. Please try again later.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Failed to create account. Please try again.
Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.
Password reset email sent! Please check your inbox.
Failed to send password reset email. Please try again.
This email address is not registered.
Unable to reset progress. Please try again.
Content is up to date. No sync needed.
You can sync content later by going to Settings.
There are no lessons available at the moment. Please check back later or sync content.
There are no quizzes available at the moment. Please check back later or sync content.
The dictionary is empty. Please sync content to load dictionary entries.
There are no words in this category yet.
No results match your search. Try different keywords.
No results found for \"%1$s\". Try different keywords.
There are no minigames available at the moment. Please check back later or sync content.
You haven\'t completed any lessons or quizzes yet. Start learning to see your progress!
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
To continue as a guest, please accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: [12/15/2025]

1. Information We Collect

We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
- Account information (name, email address)
- Learning progress and achievements
- Device information for app functionality

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:
- Provide and improve our services
- Track your learning progress
- Send you notifications (if enabled)
- Analyze app usage to improve user experience

3. Data Storage

Your data is stored securely using:
- Firebase Authentication for account management
- Firebase Firestore for progress synchronization
- Local device storage for offline access

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:
- Firebase services (for app functionality)
- Analytics services (for app improvement)

5. Your Rights

You have the right to:
- Access your personal data
- Request deletion of your data
- Opt-out of data collection (some features may be unavailable)

6. Children's Privacy

Our app is designed for educational purposes. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

8. Contact Us

If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the app settings.

Enano, Reianna Jennel
Lamsen, Craig Eminem
Montana, Juniel
Salgado, John Ross

Terms of Service

Last Updated: [12/15/2025]

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Kamaynikasyon, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

2. Description of Service

Kamaynikasyon is an educational app designed to teach sign language through interactive lessons, quizzes, and minigames.

3. User Accounts

- You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account
- You agree to provide accurate and complete information
- You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account

4. User Conduct

You agree not to:
- Use the app for any illegal purpose
- Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the app
- Interfere with or disrupt the app's functionality
- Copy, modify, or distribute app content without permission

5. Intellectual Property

All content in the app, including lessons, quizzes, and educational materials, is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.

6. Limitation of Liability

Kamaynikasyon is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the app.

7. Modifications to Service

We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time without notice.

8. Termination

We may terminate or suspend your account if you violate these terms.

9. Governing Law

These terms are governed by applicable laws.

10. Contact Information

For questions about these terms, please contact us through the app settings.

This will permanently delete:

• All your learning progress
• All quiz scores and achievements
• Your profile information
• All cached content
• All app settings

This action cannot be undone. You will be signed out and returned to the login screen.

Are you sure you want to delete all your account data?
All account data has been deleted successfully.
Failed to delete some data. Please try again.
Test Version mode is limited to admin accounts.
